news.t: Capital Group Launches 7 New ETFs on the New York Stock Exchange

holdings.infoBox: CGIC is an equity ETF with a total of 210 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.90%, CAPITAL GROUP CENTRAL CASH FUN CAPITAL GROUP CNTRL CSH M at 3.41%, ASML Holding at 3.20%, MediaTek at 2.51%, and Samsung Electronics at 2.48%.

overview.description: The Capital Group International Core Equity ETF (CGIC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns by globally investing in companies, excluding those from the United States. CGIC was launched on Jun 25, 2024 and is issued by Capital Group.
